summary: Entry point for shipyard-cp AI orchestration control plane. Defines architecture with LiteLLM as inference gateway, worker adapters for Codex/Claude Code/Antigravity, and OSS connectors. Documents setup, API endpoints, implementation status (P0/P1/P2 complete), and module structure.
tests: GitHub Projects v2 live tests verified

refactoring_candidates.details: jobStore, storeJob, getStoredJob, removeStoredJob, estimateDuration, generateResult are duplicated across codex-adapter.ts, claude-code-adapter.ts, antigravity-adapter.ts
refactoring_candidates.solution: Move to BaseWorkerAdapter as protected methods

refactoring_candidates.details: @deprecated staleCheckSync and checkStaleSync methods were unused
refactoring_candidates.solution: Remove deprecated sync methods - async versions are used instead

refactoring_candidates.issue: 21 `as any` type casts on route handlers
refactoring_candidates.details: Fastify route handlers with preHandler used `as any` to bypass type checking
refactoring_candidates.solution: Define `type Handler = RouteHandlerMethod` and use `as Handler` for explicit type assertion

refactoring_candidates.details: Server startup/shutdown messages used console.log/error instead of structured logger
refactoring_candidates.solution: Import getLogger from monitoring module and use child logger with component context

refactoring_candidates.details: Files exceeding 700 lines may need splitting
refactoring_candidates.solution: Extract domain-specific types and store modules
